Hallmark pathway process categories

Source: R/data.R
hallmark_pathway_categories.Rd

A two-column data frame mapping each MSigDB Hallmark gene-set name to its biological process category, as defined in Table 1 of Liberzon et al. (2015). Categories are: "cellular_component", "development", "DNA_damage", "immune", "metabolic", "pathway", "proliferation", and "signaling".

Usage

hallmark_pathway_categories

Format

A data frame with 50 rows and 2 columns:

term

Character. Hallmark gene-set name, with the "HALLMARK_" prefix removed to match the term column of hallmark_t2g.

process_category

Character. Biological process category assigned in Liberzon et al. (2015), Table 1.

Source

Process categories taken from Table 1 of Liberzon et al. (2015). Data prepared by inst/prepare_data/hallmark_pathway_categories.R.

References

Liberzon, A., Birger, C., Thorvaldsdóttir, H., Ghandi, M., Mesirov, J. P., & Tamayo, P. (2015). The Molecular Signatures Database hallmark gene set collection. Cell Systems, 1(6), 417–425. doi:10.1016/j.cels.2015.12.004
